steps.title: Keep parentheticals attached
steps.content: The sentence lists three data points: length, slip rate, and most recent deformation. Parenthetical measurements should attach directly to the nouns they explain, and commas should separate the series items.

steps.title: Punctuate the data series
steps.content: A and B put unnecessary commas between each noun and its parenthetical measurement. D omits punctuation between the first two series items. The answer is C.
